issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Cross Guild} type OR a type including 'Baroque Works', not if a Card named 'Cross Guild' is on board. Should use LeaderHasAnyType condition.

Action type is ReturnToHand but effect text specifies 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck', which requires a different action (no standard action matches this precisely; closest would be a custom/trash-like effect, but ReturnToHand is incorrect).
Effect text begins with '[Your Turn]' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent. This is a major violation.
